title: Councilors Pass City Budget, Advance Juvenile Reform Ordinance
raw_text: Providence, RI – At tonight’s city council meeting, councilors passed the City’s $636 million budget for fiscal year 2027. Under the leadership of Chair Miguel Sanchez, the Special Committee on […] The post Councilors Pass City Budget, Advance Juvenile Reform Ordinance appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The city council approved the city budget for the upcoming year. They also moved forward with a law to reform the juvenile justice system.
summary.es: El concejo municipal aprobó el presupuesto de la ciudad para el próximo año. También avanzaron con una ley para reformar el sistema de justicia juvenil.
summary.pt: A câmara municipal aprovou o orçamento da cidade para o próximo ano. Eles também avançaram com uma lei para reformar o sistema de justiça juvenil.
summary.zh: 市议会批准了下一年度的城市预算。他们还推进了一项改革少年司法系统的法律。

title: Providence City Council Passes FY26 City Budget with Fairer Tax Rates for Working Families
raw_text: Budget features fair tax rates, modest tax levy increase, preserved Sustainability Department role, and funds to cover bulky item disposal and recreational programming. At tonight’s Special City Council meeting, councilors […] The post Providence City Council Passes FY26 City Budget with Fairer Tax Rates for Working Families appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The Providence City Council approved the city budget for fiscal year 2026. The new budget includes fairer tax rates designed to help working families pay less in taxes.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal de Providence aprobó el presupuesto de la ciudad para el año fiscal 2026. El nuevo presupuesto incluye tasas de impuestos más justas diseñadas para ayudar a las familias trabajadoras a pagar menos impuestos.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal de Providence aprovou o orçamento da cidade para o ano fiscal de 2026. O novo orçamento inclui taxas de impostos mais justas projetadas para ajudar as famílias trabalhadoras a pagar menos impostos.
summary.zh: 普罗维登斯市议会批准了2026财年的城市预算。新预算包含更公平的税率，旨在帮助工薪家庭少缴税款。

title: Housing and Fair Taxation Ordinances Pass Through Council Committee
raw_text: Committee on Ways and Means passes 8 Law ordinance and the BUILD Act Providence, RI – Tonight, the Committee on Ways and Means unanimously recommended two ordinances to the full […] The post Housing and Fair Taxation Ordinances Pass Through Council Committee appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The city council committee approved new rules about housing and fair taxation. These ordinances will now move forward for a full council vote.
summary.es: El comité del concejo municipal aprobó nuevas reglas sobre vivienda e impuestos justos. Estas ordenanzas ahora avanzarán para una votación del concejo completo.
summary.pt: O comitê da câmara municipal aprovou novas regras sobre habitação e tributação justa. Essas ordenanças agora avançarão para votação completa da câmara.
summary.zh: 市议会委员会批准了关于住房和公平税收的新规定。这些法令现在将提交市议会全体投票表决。

title: Councilors Unanimously Pass Historic Expansion of Police Oversight in Providence
raw_text: Providence, RI – Tonight, councilors unanimously passed amendments to strengthen civilian oversight of the Providence Police Department by expanding the Providence External Review Authority’s (PERA’s) oversight powers. The updated ordinance will […] The post Councilors Unanimously Pass Historic Expansion of Police Oversight in Providence appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The Providence City Council voted unanimously to expand oversight of the police department. This historic change will create stronger systems to monitor and review police activities in the city.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal de Providence votó unánimemente para ampliar la supervisión del departamento de policía. Este cambio histórico creará sistemas más fuertes para monitorear y revisar las actividades policiales en la ciudad.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal de Providence votou unanimemente para expandir a supervisão do departamento de polícia. Esta mudança histórica criará sistemas mais fortes para monitorar e revisar as atividades policiais na cidade.
summary.zh: 普罗维登斯市议会一致投票通过扩大对警察部门的监督。这一历史性变革将建立更强大的系统来监督和审查该市的警务活动。

title: Councilor Justin Roias Issues Statement in Support of Etta Apartments Tenant Union
raw_text: Providence, RI —Tenant unions are organizations of tenants that come together to advocate for themselves and their neighbors. Our neighbors at the Etta Apartments in the North End have come […] The post Councilor Justin Roias Issues Statement in Support of Etta Apartments Tenant Union appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: City Councilor Justin Roias has released a statement supporting the tenant union at Etta Apartments. He is backing the residents who have organized to address concerns about their housing conditions.
summary.es: El concejal Justin Roias publicó una declaración apoyando al sindicato de inquilinos de Etta Apartments. Él respalda a los residentes que se han organizado para abordar preocupaciones sobre sus condiciones de vivienda.
summary.pt: O vereador Justin Roias divulgou uma declaração apoiando o sindicato de inquilinos do Etta Apartments. Ele está apoiando os moradores que se organizaram para resolver preocupações sobre suas condições de moradia.
summary.zh: 市议员贾斯汀·罗亚斯发表声明支持埃塔公寓租户工会。他支持组织起来解决住房条件问题的居民。

title: Councilors Vote to Expand Police Oversight in Providence
raw_text: The ordinance strengthening PERA requires one more vote to become law Providence, RI – Tonight, councilors voted for the first time to strengthen civilian oversight of the Providence Police Department […] The post Councilors Vote to Expand Police Oversight in Providence appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The Providence City Council voted to expand oversight of the police department. This means there will be more monitoring and review of how police officers do their jobs.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal de Providence votó para ampliar la supervisión del departamento de policía. Esto significa que habrá más monitoreo y revisión de cómo los oficiales de policía hacen su trabajo.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal de Providence votou para expandir a supervisão do departamento de polícia. Isso significa que haverá mais monitoramento e revisão de como os policiais fazem seu trabalho.
summary.zh: 普罗维登斯市议会投票决定扩大对警察局的监督。这意味着将对警察如何执行工作进行更多的监控和审查。

title: Council President Miller Issues Statement Following Rent Stabilization Veto Override Vote
raw_text: Council President Miller Issues Statement Following Rent Stabilization Veto Override Vote Providence, RI — Following tonight’s vote on the rent stabilization veto override, Council President Rachel Miller released the following statement: I’m […] The post Council President Miller Issues Statement Following Rent Stabilization Veto Override Vote appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The Providence City Council voted to override the mayor's veto of a rent stabilization measure. This means the rent control policy will now become law despite the mayor's opposition.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal de Providence votó para anular el veto del alcalde sobre una medida de estabilización de alquileres. Esto significa que la política de control de alquileres ahora se convertirá en ley a pesar de la oposición del alcalde.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal de Providence votou para anular o veto do prefeito sobre uma medida de estabilização de aluguéis. Isso significa que a política de controle de aluguéis agora se tornará lei apesar da oposição do prefeito.
summary.zh: 普罗维登斯市议会投票推翻了市长对租金稳定措施的否决。这意味着尽管市长反对，租金管制政策现在将成为法律。

title: Council President Miller Schedules Vote to Override Veto of Rent Stabilization Ordinance
raw_text: Residents are encouraged to attend the May 15th meeting as the City Council considers the final step to enact rent stabilization for Providence Providence, RI — Today, Providence City Council President Rachel Miller announced that the Council […] The post Council President Miller Schedules Vote to Override Veto of Rent Stabilization Ordinance appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The City Council President has scheduled a vote to try to pass a rent control law after the mayor rejected it. If the council votes to override the mayor's veto, the law limiting rent increases could still take effect.
summary.es: El Presidente del Concejo Municipal ha programado una votación para intentar aprobar una ley de control de alquileres después de que el alcalde la rechazara. Si el concejo vota para anular el veto del alcalde, la ley que limita los aumentos de alquiler aún podría entrar en vigor.
summary.pt: O Presidente da Câmara Municipal agendou uma votação para tentar aprovar uma lei de controle de aluguel depois que o prefeito a rejeitou. Se a câmara votar para anular o veto do prefeito, a lei que limita os aumentos de aluguel ainda poderá entrar em vigor.
summary.zh: 市议会主席安排了一次投票,试图在市长否决后通过租金管制法。如果市议会投票推翻市长的否决,限制租金上涨的法律仍可能生效。

title: Providence City Council Introduces Local Vendor Preference Ordinance, Considers $5.45M CDBG Budget, Green Revolving Fund
raw_text: Providence, RI – Tonight, Majority Leader Pedro J. Espinal (Ward 10) introduced an ordinance that would establish a certified local vendor program and apply a 5% evaluative preference in bid […] The post Providence City Council Introduces Local Vendor Preference Ordinance, Considers $5.45M CDBG Budget, Green Revolving Fund appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The City Council introduced an ordinance to give preference to local vendors in city contracts and is reviewing a $5.45 million community development budget. They are also considering creating a Green Revolving Fund for environmental projects.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal presentó una ordenanza para dar preferencia a vendedores locales en contratos de la ciudad y está revisando un presupuesto de desarrollo comunitario de $5.45 millones. También están considerando crear un Fondo Rotativo Verde para proyectos ambientales.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal apresentou uma portaria para dar preferência a fornecedores locais em contratos da cidade e está revisando um orçamento de desenvolvimento comunitário de $5,45 milhões. Eles também estão considerando criar um Fundo Rotativo Verde para projetos ambientais.
summary.zh: 市议会提出了一项条例，在市政合同中优先考虑本地供应商，并正在审查545万美元的社区发展预算。他们还在考虑设立绿色循环基金用于环保项目。

title: Providence Files First Enforcement Action Under Rent-Setting Algorithm Ban at Direction of the City Council
raw_text: Filing follows tenant complaints alleging corporate landlord used dynamic pricing software in violation of city law Providence, RI – Today, at the direction of Providence City Council President Rachel Miller (Ward 13), […] The post Providence Files First Enforcement Action Under Rent-Setting Algorithm Ban at Direction of the City Council appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: Providence has taken its first legal action against a landlord or company for using computer algorithms to set rental prices, which is now banned in the city. The City Council directed this enforcement to protect renters from artificially high rents caused by automated pricing software.
summary.es: Providence ha tomado su primera acción legal contra un propietario o empresa por usar algoritmos informáticos para fijar precios de alquiler, lo cual ahora está prohibido en la ciudad. El Concejo Municipal ordenó esta medida para proteger a los inquilinos de alquileres artificialmente altos causados por software de precios automatizados.
summary.pt: Providence tomou sua primeira ação legal contra um proprietário ou empresa por usar algoritmos de computador para definir preços de aluguel, o que agora é proibido na cidade. A Câmara Municipal ordenou esta fiscalização para proteger os inquilinos de aluguéis artificialmente altos causados por software de preços automatizados.
summary.zh: 普罗维登斯首次对使用计算机算法设定租金的房东或公司采取法律行动,该市现已禁止这种做法。市议会指示执行此项措施,以保护租户免受自动定价软件导致的人为高租金影响。

title: Providence City Council Passes Rent Stabilization
raw_text: The historic action delivers long-awaited housing stability and predictability for Providence renters, capping annual rent increases at 4% Providence, RI – Tonight, the Providence City Council voted to approve the […] The post Providence City Council Passes Rent Stabilization appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The Providence City Council has passed a rent stabilization measure to help protect tenants from large rent increases. This new policy aims to make housing more affordable and prevent displacement of residents.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal de Providence aprobó una medida de estabilización de alquileres para proteger a los inquilinos de grandes aumentos de renta. Esta nueva política busca hacer la vivienda más asequible y prevenir el desplazamiento de residentes.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal de Providence aprovou uma medida de estabilização de aluguel para proteger inquilinos de grandes aumentos no aluguel. Esta nova política visa tornar a moradia mais acessível e prevenir o deslocamento de residentes.
summary.zh: 普罗维登斯市议会通过了租金稳定措施，以保护租户免受大幅租金上涨的影响。这项新政策旨在使住房更加负担得起并防止居民被迫搬迁。

title: Councilman John Goncalves Statement in Opposition to Brook Street Demolition at Brown University
raw_text: Providence, RI – Brown University may soon be advancing plans for a new economics building on Brook Street, between Benevolent and Charlesfield Street. Today, I’m joining neighbors next to the proposed site in raising […] The post Councilman John Goncalves Statement in Opposition to Brook Street Demolition at Brown University appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: Councilman John Goncalves is speaking out against Brown University's plan to tear down buildings on Brook Street. He opposes the demolition and wants to protect the existing structures in that area.
summary.es: El concejal John Goncalves se opone al plan de la Universidad de Brown de demoler edificios en Brook Street. Él está en contra de la demolición y quiere proteger las estructuras existentes en esa área.
summary.pt: O vereador John Goncalves está se manifestando contra o plano da Universidade Brown de demolir edifícios na Brook Street. Ele se opõe à demolição e quer proteger as estruturas existentes nessa área.
summary.zh: 市议员约翰·贡萨尔维斯反对布朗大学拆除布鲁克街建筑物的计划。他反对拆除并希望保护该地区的现有建筑。

title: Rent Stabilization Passes Providence City Council for the First Time
raw_text: Providence, RI – Tonight, for the first time in Providence’s history, the City Council voted on a rent stabilization ordinance. After being voted out of the Special Committee on Health, Opportunity, Prosperity, and Education (HOPE) […] The post Rent Stabilization Passes Providence City Council for the First Time appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The Providence City Council has passed rent stabilization for the first time. This new policy will help limit how much landlords can increase rent each year.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal de Providence aprobó la estabilización de alquileres por primera vez. Esta nueva política ayudará a limitar cuánto pueden aumentar los propietarios el alquiler cada año.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal de Providence aprovou a estabilização de aluguéis pela primeira vez. Esta nova política ajudará a limitar quanto os proprietários podem aumentar o aluguel a cada ano.
summary.zh: 普罗维登斯市议会首次通过了租金稳定政策。这项新政策将帮助限制房东每年可以增加的租金幅度。

title: New Poll Shows Overwhelming Support for Rent Stabilization in Providence
raw_text: Citywide results align with previous statewide polling and reinforce demand for action on rental costs. Providence, RI – A new poll reported in the Boston Globe shows strong support for rent stabilization in […] The post New Poll Shows Overwhelming Support for Rent Stabilization in Providence appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: A new poll shows that most Providence residents support rent stabilization policies. These policies would limit how much landlords can increase rent each year.
summary.es: Una nueva encuesta muestra que la mayoría de los residentes de Providence apoyan políticas de estabilización de alquileres. Estas políticas limitarían cuánto pueden aumentar los propietarios el alquiler cada año.
summary.pt: Uma nova pesquisa mostra que a maioria dos residentes de Providence apoia políticas de estabilização de aluguéis. Essas políticas limitariam quanto os proprietários podem aumentar o aluguel a cada ano.
summary.zh: 一项新民意调查显示，大多数普罗维登斯居民支持租金稳定政策。这些政策将限制房东每年可以增加的租金涨幅。

title: City Council BUILDs on Previous Housing Legislation with New Affordable Housing Act
raw_text: Providence, RI – Today, at a press conference, City Council President Rachel Miller (Ward 13), Deputy Majority Leader Mary Kay Harris (Ward 11), and non-profit housing developers announced the Boosting Urban Investment to Launch Development (BUILD) […] The post City Council BUILDs on Previous Housing Legislation with New Affordable Housing Act appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The City Council passed a new Affordable Housing Act that builds on previous housing laws. This law aims to create more affordable housing options for Providence residents.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal aprobó una nueva Ley de Vivienda Asequible que se basa en leyes de vivienda anteriores. Esta ley tiene como objetivo crear más opciones de vivienda asequible para los residentes de Providence.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal aprovou uma nova Lei de Habitação Acessível que se baseia em leis habitacionais anteriores. Esta lei visa criar mais opções de moradia acessível para os residentes de Providence.
summary.zh: 市议会通过了一项新的经济适用房法案，该法案以之前的住房法律为基础。该法律旨在为普罗维登斯居民创造更多经济适用房选择。

title: Committee Advances Rent Stabilization with Positive Recommendation
raw_text: Providence, RI – Tonight, the Providence City Council’s Special Committee on Health, Opportunity, Prosperity, and Education (HOPE) voted unanimously to advance the proposed rent stabilization ordinance out of committee, recommending […] The post Committee Advances Rent Stabilization with Positive Recommendation appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: A city committee has voted to recommend a rent stabilization policy that would limit how much landlords can increase rent each year. The proposal will now move forward to the full city council for a final vote.
summary.es: Un comité de la ciudad ha votado para recomendar una política de estabilización de alquileres que limitaría cuánto pueden aumentar los propietarios el alquiler cada año. La propuesta ahora avanzará al concejo municipal completo para una votación final.
summary.pt: Um comitê da cidade votou para recomendar uma política de estabilização de aluguéis que limitaria quanto os proprietários podem aumentar o aluguel a cada ano. A proposta agora seguirá para o conselho municipal completo para uma votação final.
summary.zh: 市政委员会投票建议实施租金稳定政策,限制房东每年可以提高的租金幅度。该提案现在将提交市议会全体会议进行最终投票。

title: Councilors Present Ordinances on Student Housing Zoning and Rental Assistance, Pass Resolution Opposing State 8 Law Expansion
raw_text: Providence, RI – Tonight, Providence City Council held a full meeting in the Council Chamber on the third floor of City Hall, where councilors presented several ordinances and resolutions on the […] The post Councilors Present Ordinances on Student Housing Zoning and Rental Assistance, Pass Resolution Opposing State 8 Law Expansion appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The city council introduced new rules about where student housing can be located and a program to help renters with financial assistance. They also voted against a state law that would expand Section 8 housing requirements.
summary.es: El concejo municipal presentó nuevas reglas sobre dónde se puede ubicar la vivienda estudiantil y un programa para ayudar a los inquilinos con asistencia financiera. También votaron en contra de una ley estatal que expandiría los requisitos de vivienda de la Sección 8.
summary.pt: A câmara municipal apresentou novas regras sobre onde moradias estudantis podem ser localizadas e um programa para ajudar inquilinos com assistência financeira. Eles também votaram contra uma lei estadual que expandiria os requisitos de moradia da Seção 8.
summary.zh: 市议会提出了关于学生住房选址的新规定以及帮助租户获得经济援助的计划。他们还投票反对一项扩大第八条住房要求的州法律。

title: Sponsors Announce Amendments to Strengthen Rent Stabilization Ordinance
raw_text: Today, Providence City Council sponsors of the proposed rent stabilization ordinance announced a slate of amendments shaped by extensive public engagement, policy research, and stakeholder feedback. The amendments respond to suggestions and feedback raised […] The post Sponsors Announce Amendments to Strengthen Rent Stabilization Ordinance appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: City council sponsors have announced changes to make the rent stabilization law stronger. These amendments aim to provide better protection for renters in Providence.
summary.es: Los patrocinadores del concejo municipal han anunciado cambios para fortalecer la ley de estabilización de alquileres. Estas enmiendas buscan proporcionar mejor protección para los inquilinos en Providence.
summary.pt: Os patrocinadores do conselho municipal anunciaram mudanças para fortalecer a lei de estabilização de aluguéis. Essas emendas visam fornecer melhor proteção para os locatários em Providence.
summary.zh: 市议会提案人宣布修改租金稳定法以使其更加有力。这些修正案旨在为普罗维登斯的租户提供更好的保护。

title: Providence City Council Establishes Working Group on Its Role in PPSD Governance
raw_text: Today, the Providence City Council announced the formation of a working group on its role in Providence Public School District (PPSD) governance—a focused, time-limited body tasked with preparing the Council for its […] The post Providence City Council Establishes Working Group on Its Role in PPSD Governance appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The Providence City Council has created a working group to examine how the council should be involved in governing the Providence Public School District. This group will study what role city council members should play in school district decisions and oversight.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal de Providence ha creado un grupo de trabajo para examinar cómo el concejo debe participar en la gobernanza del Distrito de Escuelas Públicas de Providence. Este grupo estudiará qué papel deben desempeñar los miembros del concejo municipal en las decisiones y supervisión del distrito escolar.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal de Providence criou um grupo de trabalho para examinar como a câmara deve estar envolvida na governança do Distrito Escolar Público de Providence. Este grupo estudará qual papel os membros da câmara municipal devem desempenhar nas decisões e supervisão do distrito escolar.
summary.zh: 普罗维登斯市议会成立了一个工作组，研究市议会应如何参与普罗维登斯公立学区的管理。该工作组将研究市议会成员在学区决策和监督中应发挥什么作用。

title: Councilors Finalize Design Standards and Utility Permits Ordinances, Address Impacts from Extreme Weather
raw_text: Tonight, Providence City Council held a full meeting in the Council Chamber on the third floor of City Hall. At the meeting, councilors unanimously finalized passage of an ordinance amendment regulating […] The post Councilors Finalize Design Standards and Utility Permits Ordinances, Address Impacts from Extreme Weather appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: City councilors approved new rules for building designs and utility permits. They also discussed how to prepare the city for extreme weather like floods and storms.
summary.es: Los concejales aprobaron nuevas reglas para diseños de edificios y permisos de servicios públicos. También discutieron cómo preparar la ciudad para clima extremo como inundaciones y tormentas.
summary.pt: Os vereadores aprovaram novas regras para projetos de construção e licenças de serviços públicos. Eles também discutiram como preparar a cidade para clima extremo como enchentes e tempestades.
summary.zh: 市议员批准了建筑设计和公用设施许可的新规定。他们还讨论了如何让城市为洪水和暴风雨等极端天气做好准备。

title: City Council Calls for the Providence Public Schools to be Returned to Local Control
raw_text: Tonight, Providence City Council held a full meeting in the Council Chamber on the third floor of City Hall. At the meeting, councilors unanimously passed a resolution urging the return of Providence […] The post City Council Calls for the Providence Public Schools to be Returned to Local Control appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The City Council wants Providence Public Schools to be controlled locally by the city again instead of by the state. They believe local control would be better for students and families in Providence.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal quiere que las Escuelas Públicas de Providence sean controladas localmente por la ciudad otra vez en lugar del estado. Creen que el control local sería mejor para los estudiantes y las familias de Providence.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal quer que as Escolas Públicas de Providence sejam controladas localmente pela cidade novamente em vez de pelo estado. Eles acreditam que o controle local seria melhor para os alunos e famílias de Providence.
summary.zh: 市议会希望普罗维登斯公立学校重新由市政府而非州政府管理。他们认为地方管理对普罗维登斯的学生和家庭更有利。

title: City Council Introduces Snowstorm After-Action Resolutions and Honors Alex Pretti, Renee Good
raw_text: Providence, RI – Tonight, the Providence City Council held a full meeting in the Council Chamber on the third floor of City Hall. Councilors unanimously approved a resolution denouncing Immigration and Customs […] The post City Council Introduces Snowstorm After-Action Resolutions and Honors Alex Pretti, Renee Good appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The City Council discussed resolutions to review what happened after recent snowstorms and how to improve the city's response. The Council also recognized Alex Pretti and Renee Good for their contributions to the community.
summary.es: El Concejo Municipal discutió resoluciones para revisar lo que sucedió después de las recientes tormentas de nieve y cómo mejorar la respuesta de la ciudad. El Concejo también reconoció a Alex Pretti y Renee Good por sus contribuciones a la comunidad.
summary.pt: A Câmara Municipal discutiu resoluções para revisar o que aconteceu após as recentes tempestades de neve e como melhorar a resposta da cidade. A Câmara também reconheceu Alex Pretti e Renee Good por suas contribuições à comunidade.
summary.zh: 市议会讨论了审查近期暴风雪后发生的情况以及如何改善城市应对措施的决议。市议会还表彰了Alex Pretti和Renee Good对社区的贡献。

title: HOPE Committee to Hold Public Hearing on Rent Stabilization Ordinance
raw_text: President Pro Tempore Juan M. Pichardo (Ward 9), who chairs the Providence City Council Special Committee on Health, Opportunity, Prosperity, and Education (HOPE), announced that the committee will hold a […] The post HOPE Committee to Hold Public Hearing on Rent Stabilization Ordinance appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: The City Council's HOPE Committee will hold a public hearing to discuss a proposed rent stabilization ordinance. This ordinance would create rules to limit how much landlords can increase rent.
summary.es: El Comité HOPE del Concejo Municipal llevará a cabo una audiencia pública para discutir una ordenanza propuesta de estabilización de alquileres. Esta ordenanza crearía reglas para limitar cuánto pueden los propietarios aumentar el alquiler.
summary.pt: O Comitê HOPE da Câmara Municipal realizará uma audiência pública para discutir uma proposta de lei de estabilização de aluguéis. Esta lei criaria regras para limitar o quanto os proprietários podem aumentar o aluguel.
summary.zh: 市议会的HOPE委员会将举行公听会,讨论拟议的租金稳定条例。该条例将制定规则,限制房东可以提高租金的幅度。

title: Councilors Introduce Rent Stabilization Ordinance, Recognize Law Enforcement and Community for Support After Brown Shooting
raw_text: Providence, RI — Tonight, a majority of the City Council formally introduced the highly anticipated rent stabilization ordinance. This proposal was announced at an event on Tuesday, January 20th, with Council President Rachel Miller (Ward 13) and President Pro Tempore Juan M. […] The post Councilors Introduce Rent Stabilization Ordinance, Recognize Law Enforcement and Community for Support After Brown Shooting appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: City councilors introduced a new law to control how much rent can increase each year. They also thanked police and community members for their help after a shooting at Brown University.
summary.es: Los concejales de la ciudad presentaron una nueva ley para controlar cuánto puede aumentar el alquiler cada año. También agradecieron a la policía y miembros de la comunidad por su ayuda después de un tiroteo en la Universidad de Brown.
summary.pt: Os vereadores da cidade apresentaram uma nova lei para controlar quanto o aluguel pode aumentar a cada ano. Eles também agradeceram à polícia e membros da comunidade por sua ajuda após um tiroteio na Universidade Brown.
summary.zh: 市议员提出了一项新法律来控制每年租金涨幅。他们还感谢警察和社区成员在布朗大学枪击案后提供的帮助。

title: ICYMI: Council President Rachel Miller Commentary: Rent stabilization could help solve Providence’s housing crisis
raw_text: In an op-ed published in The Boston Globe yesterday, Jan. 20th, City Council President Rachel Miller made the case for rent stabilization in Providence. The ordinance will be introduced officially […] The post ICYMI: Council President Rachel Miller Commentary: Rent stabilization could help solve Providence’s housing crisis appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: Council President Rachel Miller says rent stabilization policies could help address Providence's housing crisis. She believes limiting how much landlords can raise rent each year would make housing more affordable for residents.
summary.es: La presidenta del Concejo Rachel Miller dice que las políticas de estabilización de alquileres podrían ayudar a abordar la crisis de vivienda de Providence. Ella cree que limitar cuánto pueden aumentar los propietarios el alquiler cada año haría la vivienda más asequible para los residentes.
summary.pt: A presidente do Conselho Rachel Miller diz que políticas de estabilização de aluguel poderiam ajudar a resolver a crise habitacional de Providence. Ela acredita que limitar quanto os proprietários podem aumentar o aluguel a cada ano tornaria a moradia mais acessível para os residentes.
summary.zh: 市议会主席雷切尔·米勒表示，租金稳定政策可以帮助解决普罗维登斯的住房危机。她认为限制房东每年加租幅度将使居民住房更加负担得起。

title: City Councilors Propose Rent Stabilization to Keep Providence Families in Their Homes
raw_text: City Council President Rachel Miller and President Pro Tempore Juan M. Pichardo are set to introduce an ordinance that allows for reasonable annual rent increases while exempting small owner-occupant landlords Providence, […] The post City Councilors Propose Rent Stabilization to Keep Providence Families in Their Homes appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: City council members have introduced a proposal to stabilize rent prices in Providence. The goal is to help families afford to stay in their homes and prevent displacement due to rising rents.
summary.es: Los miembros del concejo municipal han presentado una propuesta para estabilizar los precios de alquiler en Providence. El objetivo es ayudar a las familias a poder quedarse en sus hogares y prevenir el desplazamiento debido al aumento de los alquileres.
summary.pt: Os membros do conselho municipal apresentaram uma proposta para estabilizar os preços de aluguel em Providence. O objetivo é ajudar as famílias a permanecerem em suas casas e prevenir o deslocamento devido ao aumento dos aluguéis.
summary.zh: 市议会成员提出了一项稳定普罗维登斯租金价格的提案。目标是帮助家庭负担得起住房并防止因租金上涨而被迫搬离。

title: Message to Ward 1 Neighbors and Businesses
raw_text: Dear Neighbors, A little over a month ago, our community was shaken by the shooting on Brown University’s campus in the heart of Ward 1. As I reflect on the […] The post Message to Ward 1 Neighbors and Businesses appeared first on Providence City Council .

summary.en: This is a general message from a city council member to residents and businesses in Ward 1. The message provides updates and information relevant to the neighborhood.
summary.es: Este es un mensaje general de un miembro del concejo municipal para residentes y negocios del Distrito 1. El mensaje proporciona actualizaciones e información relevante para el vecindario.
summary.pt: Esta é uma mensagem geral de um membro do conselho municipal para residentes e empresas do Distrito 1. A mensagem fornece atualizações e informações relevantes para o bairro.
